title: Love
content:
Love on his errand bound to go
    Can swim the flood and wade through snow,
    Where way is none, 't will creep and wind
    And eat through Alps its home to find.
meaning:
"Love" is a quintessential example of Ralph Waldo Emerson's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
